docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $582.18 FILED BY BERGER DONALD M DBA REGENCY LIMOUSINE CO AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS MARY COF LOGO ENTERTAINMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
